tasks.label: Restart Backend
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; cd backend; node src/server.js

tasks.label: Restart Vite Dev Server
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'vite' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; npx vite --port 5173

tasks.label: Restart Vite (env reload)
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'vite' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; npx vite --port 5173 --host

tasks.label: Restart Backend (presence fix)
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'server' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; cd c:\Users\LOUIS-QUATORZE\Documents\harchive-main\backend; node src/server.js

tasks.label: Restart Backend on 3099
tasks.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3099 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { taskkill /F /PID $_ }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { taskkill /F /PID $_ }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; cd c:\Users\LOUIS-QUATORZE\Documents\harchive-main\backend; node src/server.js
